# GreenBus

> GreenBus is a Ukrainian online bus ticket aggregator for routes across Ukraine and between Ukraine and Europe. The service helps passengers compare partner carrier offers, prices and departure times, then buy an electronic bus ticket online.

GreenBus is not a bus carrier and does not operate buses directly. Trips shown on the website are provided by partner carrier companies. GreenBus provides search, comparison, online booking, card payment and e-ticket delivery.

The public website uses localized URLs with language prefixes: `/uk/`, `/ru/` and `/en/`. Ukrainian is the primary language version. Public SEO pages use trailing slashes.

## What GreenBus Does

GreenBus helps passengers:

- Find bus routes by origin, destination and date.
- Compare available trips by carrier, price, departure time, arrival time and duration.
- Book bus tickets online and receive an electronic ticket by email.
- Read route, city, country, booking, payment and refund information.

GreenBus works with partner carriers and aggregates their available offers. Ticket conditions, departure points, arrival points and refund rules can depend on the selected trip and carrier.

## Public Pages

- [GreenBus Ukrainian home page](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/): Primary Ukrainian landing page with bus ticket search, popular routes, service benefits and entry points to public sections.
- [About GreenBus](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/about/): Company information, service positioning and background for passengers and partners.
- [Privacy policy](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/privacy-policy/): Information about personal data processing and privacy rules for GreenBus users.

## Popular Route Hubs

- [Bus routes](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/routes/): Public hub of popular bus routes with links to canonical route pages.

Route pages explain specific bus directions and can include origin city, destination city, countries, price information, partner carrier data and booking context when available from the GreenBus API.

## Countries And Cities

- [All countries](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/all-countries/): Public country and city directory for discovering GreenBus destinations.

Country and city pages are intended to help passengers find available directions from a country or city. These pages may include localized city descriptions and real popular routes when GreenBus has data for them.

## FAQ And Support

- [Booking seats FAQ](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/faq/bronjuvannja-mists/): Answers about booking bus seats, choosing passengers and completing an order.
- [Routes and buses FAQ](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/faq/routes-and-buses/): Answers about routes, buses, trip details, departure and arrival information.
- [Ticket refund FAQ](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/faq/ticket-refund/): Answers about refunds, cancellation rules and ticket return questions.

Support contacts:

- Phone: +380 98 744 6419
- Phone: +380 99 603 3832
- Email: greenbus.ukraine@gmail.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/+380987446419
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/380987446419

## Partners

- [For carriers](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/for-carriers/): Information for bus carriers that want to sell tickets through GreenBus.
- [For agents](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/for-agents/): Information for agents and travel partners that want to work with GreenBus ticketing tools.

GreenBus partner pages are for commercial cooperation. Passenger booking and route discovery should start from the home page, routes hub, country directory or FAQ pages.

## Language Versions

- [Ukrainian version](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/): Primary localized version of the GreenBus website.
- [Russian version](https://greenbus.com.ua/ru/): Russian localized version of the GreenBus website.
- [English version](https://greenbus.com.ua/en/): English localized version of the GreenBus website.

## Structured Data And Discovery

GreenBus public pages use localized metadata, canonical URLs, Open Graph data and Schema.org JSON-LD where it fits the page type. Common structured data can include Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, Article or route-related data when supported by real page data.

Use the sitemap for full URL discovery and use this file as a curated AI-readable overview of the most important public sections.

## Optional

- [GreenBus blog](https://greenbus.com.ua/uk/blog/): Articles and travel guides related to bus stations, routes, countries, cities and passenger information.
- [XML sitemap](https://greenbus.com.ua/sitemap.xml): Full sitemap with localized public URLs and hreflang alternates.
